name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence (1-tick)
hypothesis: Previous attempts to use BBO vs deep book divergence (`obi_1 - obi_ex_bbo`) at a 20-tick horizon failed completely. The feedback suggested probing a different timescale. This spec tests the hypothesis that this divergence is a very short-lived signal, where a strong BBO imbalance that is NOT supported by the deeper book quickly collapses. We test this at the minimum 1-tick horizon.
mutation_note: Following 'change_horizon' recommendation. The feature family has failed at h=10 and h=20. This is a final diagnostic test at the shortest possible horizon (h=1) before abandoning the feature.
